prompt: I just signed up for Later's Starter plan and want to schedule posts for my small bakery's Instagram and TikTok. Walk me through getting started.
assertions: Explains how to connect Instagram and TikTok accounts for auto-publishing
Mentions the visual content calendar and drag-and-drop scheduling workflow
Notes the Starter plan post limit and suggests upgrading if they need more than 30 posts per profile per month
Mentions Linkin.bio as a way to drive traffic from Instagram to their bakery's website or menu

prompt: My team wants to use Later for content approval but our manager can't see posts before they go live. What's wrong?
assertions: Identifies that approval workflows require the Growth plan or higher
Explains the role structure and how to configure contributor vs admin permissions
Suggests upgrading from Starter if they're on the lower plan
Mentions alternative workarounds if upgrading isn't an option

prompt: We're evaluating Later Influence for our DTC brand's influencer program. What does it offer compared to standalone influencer platforms?
assertions: Describes Later Influence's core capabilities including influencer discovery, campaign management, and content review
Mentions the Reporting API for pulling analytics into BI tools
Notes that Later Influence is enterprise-priced and separate from Later Social plans
Routes to /sales-influencer-marketing for broader platform comparison across the influencer marketing landscape
